articles.title: Ryanair Is Now Debt-Free With 620 Owned 737s
articles.summary: On May 25th, Ryanair announced that it had repaid its last €1.2 billion bond leaving the Ryanair Group effectively debt free. It comes at a good time as the airline heads into a challenging summer of growth, while hopefully still offering low fares.
